step_by_step_reasoning: The transcript and whiteboard layout present a circular supply chain tracking solution. Real-time IoT sensors ingest temperature data (IoT Core), which triggers validation logic (Lambda). Valid transactions are routed via ALB to a Hyperledger Fabric blockchain running on EKS. Blockchain state updates are written to DynamoDB for off-chain querying, which syncs to S3 to feed SageMaker predictive models. Alerts on smart contract threshold violations are routed from EKS to SNS, notifying operators/drivers (User node). Security keys are managed via CloudHSM, and operations are monitored using CloudWatch.

graph.name: Circular Supply Chain Tracking with Blockchain and IoT
graph.notes: Ensures supply chain sustainability and transaction transparency using Hyperledger Fabric on AWS. Tracks refrigeration temperature thresholds dynamically.

nodes.name: IoT Platform
nodes.notes: Ingests environmental data from farm-level sensors.

nodes.name: Validation Lambda
nodes.notes: Checks sensor values against set thresholds.

nodes.name: ALB
nodes.notes: Forwards validated transaction traffic to blockchain nodes.

nodes.name: Blockchain Network
nodes.notes: Runs Hyperledger Fabric nodes inside EKS containers.

nodes.name: Off-chain Database
nodes.notes: Stores off-chain read replicas of encrypted ledger data.

nodes.name: SageMaker
nodes.notes: Runs predictive analytics to predict spoilage/delays.

nodes.name: SNS
nodes.notes: Sends push notifications on threshold anomalies.

nodes.name: CloudWatch
nodes.notes: Monitors container performance and scales node sizes.

nodes.name: CloudHSM
nodes.notes: Secures cryptographic keys in dedicated hardware security modules.

nodes.name: Drivers & Operations
nodes.notes: Receives real-time route-change notifications on mobile.

edges.notes: IoT rules engine triggers validation logic.
Lambda forwards valid transaction to load balancer.
Routes transactions to EKS blockchain network.
Syncs off-chain datastore to S3 for history.
Sagemaker uses historical S3 data for ML models.
Smart contract triggers SNS event when a violations occur.
Provides cryptographic key verification for blocks.
